title: Restore ADR policy across framework docs
description: Remove every 'no ADRs' statement (principles, template PROCESS, root PROCESS, CONTEXT Lifecycle entry, TEAM_DIRECTIVE Don'ts). Write the decision-record split into PROCESS and Principles: ADRs record hard-to-reverse decisions at grill time (criteria: hard to reverse, surprising, real trade-off); the retro remains the sprint-time record. ADR location = methodology namespace, resolved by EXEC-001; ADRs are committed markdown (understanding, not adherence). Acceptance: no doc contradicts the policy; alignment gate passes the sweep; Src-First order observed.
notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 3, 5, 6, 14. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-1).
